summary: The diff implements all three requirements with proper positioning, interactivity, and asset handling. A new CategoryImageSection component was created that displays the category thumbnail image as a clickable element, toggling the visibility of 7 product images in a grid layout with visual feedback. The component was integrated into ProductBrowse.tsx below the existing promotional sections. All image paths correctly reference the frontend/public/assets/uploaded/ directory.

hallucinated_features.description: Added animation effects (animate-in, fade-in, slide-in-from-top-4) for the product images grid when expanded
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest did not specify animation effects for the expandable section, only visual feedback for hover/active states on the category image itself

hallucinated_features.description: Added accessibility features including focus ring styling (focus:ring-2, focus:ring-primary, focus:ring-offset-2)
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest did not mention accessibility requirements or focus states

hallucinated_features.description: Added gradient overlays on hover for both category image and product images
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest specified visual feedback (hover states, active states) but did not prescribe specific gradient overlay implementations

hallucinated_features.description: Added chevron icons (ChevronDown, ChevronUp) to indicate expand/collapse state
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest did not specify the use of icons or how to visually indicate the expandable nature of the section
